🚀 Hiring: AI Full Stack Engineer (2+ years of AI/ML application development experienc (Contract)
🏢 Company: Infosys
🌍 Location: Remote
📅 Duration: 3 Months (Extendable based on performance)
⚡ Joining: Immediate Joiners Preferred
👨‍💻 Experience: 5+ Years (Full Stack) + 2+ Years (AI)
🔍 Role Overview
We are seeking a self-driven AI Full Stack Engineer with strong experience in developing AI-powered applications and modern full-stack solutions.
🛠️ Key Responsibilities
Develop AI applications using LangChain and LangGraph
Build and integrate full-stack applications
Use AI tools like GitHub Copilot for faster development
Design and develop AI Agents and workflows
Rapid prototyping using vibe coding tools
Handle 2–3 use cases simultaneously
Work in a remote setup with global teams
✅ Required Skills & Experience
5+ years of Full Stack Development experience
2+ years of AI/ML application development experience
Strong proficiency in Python
Hands-on with LangChain, LangGraph
Experience with AI tools and agent-based systems
Ability to multitask and work independently
Comfortable working till 1 PM EST
💡 What We’re Looking For
Self-starter and highly motivated
Strong problem-solving skills
Ability to work in a fast-paced environment
📩 Share your resume or connect for more details
khushi.j@infowaygroup.com

extracted.full_content:
Nandini Jadhav

Talent Acquisition

🚀 Hiring: Senior Full Stack Engineer (AI & GenAI) | Contract Role
We are actively looking for a Senior Full Stack Engineer with strong expertise in AI & Generative AI technologies to join our team and build next-generation, scalable applications.

📌 Job Details
Role: Senior Full Stack Engineer (AI & GenAI)
Experience: 5+ Years
Job Type: Contract
Openings: 7
Location: Hyderabad, Gurugram, Noida, Bangalore, Pune
Notice Period: Immediate Joiners Preferred
Compensation: Up to 23 LPA

🛠️ Key Skills Required
React.js + Node.js + Python
AWS (Lambda, DynamoDB, API Gateway, S3)
JavaScript, HTML, CSS
AI Tools: Cursor, Bruno
Strong understanding of AI/GenAI concepts

📋 Key Responsibilities
🔹 Frontend & Backend Development
Design and build responsive, high-performance UIs using React
Develop scalable backend services using Node.js and Python
🔹 AI / GenAI Integration
Implement and optimize RAG pipelines and Agentic AI workflows
Work with frameworks like LangChain and LlamaIndex
🔹 API & Cloud Architecture
Design and implement GraphQL and REST APIs
Deploy serverless applications using AWS (Lambda, Bedrock, S3)
🔹 Data & AI Operations
Build and manage vector search solutions (Pinecone, PGVector)
Handle end-to-end AI/ML pipelines from development to production
🔹 Leadership & Engineering Excellence
Lead technical initiatives and mentor junior developers
Ensure scalability, security, and observability of applications

🎯 Required Skills & Experience
Minimum 5+ years of software development experience
Strong expertise in React (Hooks, State Management, TypeScript)
Proficiency in Node.js and Python (FastAPI / Flask / Django)
Hands-on experience with GraphQL
Strong experience with AWS cloud services
Practical experience with LLMs, Prompt Engineering, and Vector Databases

⭐ Preferred Qualifications
Experience with AI-assisted development tools (Cursor, Claude Code)
Knowledge of MLOps practices and AI safety/guardrails
Familiarity with Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD pipelines
📢 Interested candidates can share profiles at:
📩 [Jadhav.nandini@hankersystems.in]

Hiring for contractual position of Senior AI Engineer (LLM / RAG / Agents) 3-5 Years 
Location Remote 
Pls share 9667627371
Follow for more position Nidhi Rajput

Senior AI Engineer (LLM / RAG / Agents)
📍 Remote | Contract
🕒 4 Hours EST Overlap
👨‍💻 Experience: 2–4 Years
Job Summary:
We are looking for a hands-on AI Engineer to build scalable, production-ready AI systems using LLMs, RAG pipelines, and agent-based architectures. The role involves designing intelligent workflows, optimizing performance, and ensuring reliability, observability, and cost efficiency.
Key Responsibilities:
Build and optimize LLM-based agents (planner, router, intent systems)
Develop RAG pipelines with embeddings, retrieval & reranking
Tune prompts, routing logic, and model performance
Implement evaluation metrics (accuracy, latency, quality)
Ensure observability (logs, traces, cost tracking)
Maintain secure, scalable APIs and CI/CD pipelines
Required Skills:
Strong experience with LLMs, RAG, and AI systems
Knowledge of vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, etc.)
Proficiency in Python or Node.js
Experience with APIs, system design, and backend development
Understanding of observability, security, and performance optimization
Good to Have:
Knowledge graphs, OpenTelemetry, Kubernetes
A/B testing, evaluation frameworks, and cost optimization
If you want, I can make an even shorter 2–3 line WhatsApp/LinkedIn version for quick hiring posts.
